IS Nordic A/S

Experts in IT infrastructure

20 years of experience

Infrastructure, Databases, Middleware and Applications.

Oracle on Oracle

IS Nordic is an Oracle Platinum Partner.

IS Nordic A/S was founded in December 2000 as a hosting provider for large IT consulting firms such as Accenture, IBM and KMD. We assist our customers in designing, transitioning and operating large and mission-critical IT systems.

Since the beginning we have been an Oracle Partner. Therefore we provide expert services around products such as Oracle Database, Oracle Weblogic Suite, Oracle Linux and Oracle Solaris.

But its not all Oracle! We provide Operations on Linux- and Windows-platforms, on SPARC- and Intel-architectures, on bare metal, hypervisor, and custom-designed private-cloud substrates.

IT Operations is a very exciting field and under constant evolution. Therefore we employ a dedicated software development team to provide the best in server- and process-automation. For our customers this translates into timely and deep visibility through Information Portals, Real-Time Monitoring, Alarms and Reporting. Our goal is to make complex running systems not only robust but also transparent and understandable.

How can we help you? Give use a call!

IT Operations

More than just hosting and taking backups.

We take pride in our ability to provide not only a reliable service, but true insight into your mission-critical IT systems.

Private Cloud

OpenStack and Kubernetes.

Empower your DevOps team with modern IaaS and PaaS technologies hosted in our Danish data-centers.

Enterprise Architecture

Let us build your foundation.

We have helped large corporations create new and fix existing Enterprise Architectures for over 10 years.

Testing Services

We specialize in enterprise application- and performance-testing.

Our consultants can support you in the management, automation and execution of your enterprise application testing.
